description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from wrangler is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with classy formals or jeans and semi-formal shirts. Length: 107 cm Width: 3.8 cm Made of pure leather Buckle and holes with a fixed loop to customise Fit Stitch detailing along the tail and on the loop for style Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
